title: The Style Guide for  (Western) Manuscript Description:  Common Practice and Future Steps
author: Holford, Matthew
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: An introduction to the style guide and ODD customisation for description of Western medieval manuscripts in TEI, which is being developed by the Bodleian Library and Cambridge University Library
